Baghlan-e-Jadid & Nawabad, Kunduz

Assets and Community Priorities

Photo-backed community priorities from FGD needs prioritization, overlaid on the Integrated Locations Database with Maps V8 styling. Each numbered marker links to a field photo and community priority note.

Photo-backed priorities + Integrated Locations Database
Cluster boundary Community boundary Flood / DRR WASH Education Irrigation Road access Health

Filter map

Community needs story

Across Baghlan and Nawabad, community FGDs identified recurring needs around flood protection, WASH, education facilities, road access, health services, and shelter. Use the cluster and village filters to explore photo-backed evidence linked to each priority theme.

No photo-backed priorities match the current filter.
